name: Plain Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F with a rack in the middle.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in the butter with a pastry blender or 2 knives until it looks like cornmeal. Stir in the milk until the dough forms a ball. The dough will be quite stiff.
3. On a lightly floured board, roll out the dough to an 1/8-inch thickness. Using a 2-inch round cookie cutter dipped in flour, cut out round crackers. Place them on an ungreased baking sheet. Prick the top of each cracker with a fork several times. Brush the top of each cracker with milk and, if desired, sprinkle with salt.
4. Bake the crackers for 15-20 minutes, or until they are light gold. Cool them on a rack and store them airtight at room temperature.
Makes around 3 1/2 dozen.
